scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that the label is drawn at exact y offset above chromosome and chromosome attributes unchanged.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Combined constraint: label drawn at exact y offset (start_y_position + 0.1 inch) and monkeypatch function does not modify chromosome attributes.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The label must be drawn at exact y offset (start_y_position + 0.1 inch) and chromosome attributes must remain unchanged.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Label drawn at wrong y coordinate (below or wrong offset) or chromosome attributes modified.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 50
chrom.end_x_position   = 350
chrom.start_y_position = 20
chrom.title_size       = 14
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Chromosome 1')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label')
print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label.svg')
result = None
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
# Check no side effects
assert chrom.start_x_position == 50
assert chrom.end_x_position == 350
assert chrom.start_y_position == 20
assert chrom.title_size == 14

# Check exact y offset in SVG
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse('test_chrom_label.svg')
root = tree.getroot()
ns = {'svg': 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'}
text_elems = root.findall('.//svg:text', ns)
found = False
for elem in text_elems:
    if elem.text and 'Chromosome 1' in elem.text:
        y = float(elem.get('y'))
        # expected y = 20 + 0.1*72 = 27.2
        assert abs(y - 27.2) < 0.1, f"Label y coordinate {y} not within tolerance"
        found = True
        break
assert found, "Label not found"
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the exact y offset constraint introduced by this operator.
Scaled executable cases must expose the no-side-effect requirement introduced by this operator.
